arts.ttl: Match Preview: Mike Tullberg’s BVB to Take on Werder Bremen at Home
arts.sum: While the club’s management are currently doing their best to put out the fires they themselves have lit, the players once again host a game of good ol’ soccer, with Ole Werner’s Werder Bremen side visiting the Westfalenstadion on a Saturday afternoon. While I do feel pretty numb about BVB playing these days, I do acknowledge that this game is maybe a tiny bit more important than others.

Dortmund sacked head coach Nuri Sahin after a bitter Champions League loss in midweek, while Bremen have all week to work on a masterplan. Four-time Bundesliga champions Bremen boast five wins on the...
